name: /import-eslint-config parses an ESLint flat-config file and emits the rule list
command: printf 'export default [{rules:{"no-eval":"error","no-console":"warn"}}]\n' > eslint.config.js && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/import-eslint-config.sh" eslint.config.js --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'parsed_format=flat' out.txt && grep -q 'rule_count=2' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
